text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho has been giving our special summer
camp training regimen everything she's got today.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey, familiaaar! Juice me!
choice_data_list: I've got it ready in the fridge.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I don't care where you've got it! Bring it to me!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: My legs are already so tired... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And just when I finally cast the most powerful
spell. Why does something stupid like this always
have to come up?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What do you think?! I'm sick and tired of it!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But finishing in this mood is even worse! I'm gonna
use my magic to burn all this boring stuff to ashes!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You're all muddy today.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Look who's talking.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I'm training hard so I can make my
comeback at the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I don't plan on writing the end of my story just
yet.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, right to the point. Well said. Magic needs
that kind of spark.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey! If you stand around like that, someone's
gonna run into you!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: Oh! Sorry, Teio!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Were you lost in thought about something?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Like the autumn Tenno Sho, perhaps?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: ...You heard about that?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, of course! You could hear Sweep a mile
away when she challenged you!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...Plus, she challenged the person I'm rooting for
too.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, I don't care what the reason is. I want
to see you get back up and try again!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
Oh!
...I'm sorry. I know you were cheering for me at
the Hanshin J.F.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ah! Wait! That's not what I'm saying!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't just cheering for you back then! I'm
cheering for you now too!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Here's my wish upon a star—I wish that you'll run
again!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Teio...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The racers talk about their dreams under the
starry summer sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And summer turns to autumn!
